## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Clerk's content strategy, review blog post feedback, and align on LLM optimization tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clerk team to provide final feedback on SSO blog post by midday tomorrow; GrowthX to implement changes and update writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Clerk's design team is working on new brand templates for content assets; GrowthX can adapt their image generation workflow once finalized](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [LLM optimization focuses on schema markup, natural language processing, and direct Q\&A formatting in content](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard set up to track performance of topic clusters, individual URLs, and LLM referrers](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Review and Feedback

  - [80% of content on track; some drift towards enterprise-style customers noted](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Agreed to use "sign-in" consistently as per Clerk's brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Technical review process: internal team first, then broader sharing for senior technical members' input](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [GrowthX encouraged to push back with data-driven insights from successful strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### SEO and LLM Optimization

  - [SEO audit shared last week; Isaac tackling site audit issues](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [LLM optimization builds on SEO foundation with added focus on schema markup (e.g., FAQ schema)](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Content strategies: natural language processing, direct Q\&A formatting, descriptive subheadings](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
  - [Internal linking preferences: docs over glossary, staying within Clerk's domain when possible](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Content Asset Design

  - [Clerk's design team working on new brand templates for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [GrowthX can adapt their image generation workflow to match Clerk's design once finalized](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Quick image generation helps avoid publishing delays](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Looker Dashboard

  - [New dashboard pulls data from Google Search Console and GA4](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Tracks performance by topic clusters, individual URLs, and LLM referrers](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - ["Not set" issue in GA4 data to be investigated further](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Conversion event tracking for sign-ups needs verification due to onboarding flow changes](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### LLM Traffic Insights

  - [Early observations suggest stronger acquisition but lower intent from ChatGPT compared to Google SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [More comprehensive down-funnel KPI tracking desired for consistent reporting](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Clerk team to provide final feedback on SSO blog post by midday tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement changes and update writing guidelines based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Investigate "not set" issue in GA4 data for LLM referrers](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1612.0)
  - [Verify sign-up conversion event tracking, especially for Next.js onboarding flow](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Explore adding down-funnel KPIs to Looker dashboard for more comprehensive reporting](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Wait for Clerk's new brand templates before finalizing content asset design approach](https://fathom.video/share/xBv9x9iskrzNSn6CU46KzGuQHMLWzs67?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
